_meta.source: Seed file — replace by running fetch_trade_data.py

data_sources.name: WTO Statistics API
data_sources.description: Merchandise trade totals, exports, imports by reporter country. Annual data.
data_sources.citation: World Trade Organization (2024). WTO Statistics Database. Retrieved from https://stats.wto.org

data_sources.name: World Bank Open Data API
data_sources.description: Trade (% of GDP), GDP current USD, bilateral trade indicators.
data_sources.citation: World Bank (2024). World Development Indicators. Retrieved from https://databank.worldbank.org/source/world-development-indicators

data_sources.name: UN Comtrade
data_sources.description: Bilateral trade flows by HS commodity code. Granular product-level data.
data_sources.citation: United Nations Statistics Division (2024). UN Comtrade Database. Retrieved from https://comtrade.un.org

_meta.methodology: Trade totals (exports, imports) sourced from WTO Statistics API indicator TS_M_AM_AllSectors_MerchandiseTrade. Bilateral partner flows sourced from UN Comtrade (HS aggregated). Commodity breakdowns use HS Section-level aggregation. All values in current USD billions. Data represents the most recent complete year available (typically 2022 or 2023). Values marked estimated=true are interpolated from 3-year averages (2021-2023) where single-year data was unavailable. Country centroids use geographic center-of-mass (not capital cities) for arc rendering accuracy.
_meta.arc_note: Trade flow arcs rendered using ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 centroids computed from Natural Earth geometries, not hardcoded coordinates. Projection-safe.
